div.head: 223. Memorandum From Secretary of State Shultz to President ReaganSource: Reagan Library, George Shultz Papers, President’s Evening Reading January–March 1984. Secret.
div.p: [Omitted here is material unrelated to Morocco.]

4. Morocco: Official Visit of the Prime Minister. Prime Minister Karim-Lamrani and I met late this afternoon to summarize the results of his visit.A record of the Shultz-Karim-Lamrani conversation is in telegram 61214 to Rabat, March 1. (Department of State, Central Foreign Policy File, Electronic Telegrams, D840137–0085) We have signed a major agreement, for expansion of the existing Voice of America broadcast facility, and initialed another, a bilateral investment treaty. We have found additional funds for FY 84 PL–480 and have restored some FMS credits. I believe we have been successful in reassuring the Moroccans of our commitment to develop assistance programs in FY 85 and FY 86 which take Morocco’s great needs into account. (S)
